steps.title: Substitute x = -2 into the function definition
steps.content:
Since we need to find $h(-2)$, substitute $x = -2$ into the given function:
$$h(-2) = 3(-2) - 7$$

steps.title: Simplify to find the result
steps.content:
Multiply first, then subtract:
$$h(-2) = -6 - 7 = -13$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
